title: Vinatā Suta Vāhana
notes: Tyagaraja kriti in Jayantasena; Adi tala; pallavi 'Vinatā Suta Vāhana Śrī Ramaṇā'; a meditation on the futility of life without the Lord's darshana and the virtue of sat-sangati (company of the pious); one of the principal compositions defining raga Jayantasena in the concert repertoire
